title: How Finishing the Task You Didn't Want to Start Builds a Godly Man's Week
caption:
A godly man finishes what he dreaded starting.

Colossians 3:23 didn't say do the work you feel like doing. It said whatever you do, work at it as for the Lord, not for men. That includes the email you've rescheduled three times and the conversation you keep avoiding.

Motivation shows up after you move, not before. You don't need the whole week solved today. You need today's rep done today. Fifteen honest minutes on the thing you're avoiding beats two hours you never start.

The task itself is small. What it trains isn't. The guy who finishes the dreaded thing on a random Tuesday is the same guy who'll finish the hard thing when it actually matters.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #manofgod #work #realtalk
